learn.core_idea: FIFO runs the earliest ready job until it blocks or exits, which can delay short jobs behind long ones.
mechanism_steps: Running job keeps CPU until completion or block.
Next queued job starts only after release.
learn.worked_example: A long first job can postpone short-job start, increasing short-job response time.
common_mistakes: Comparing only turnaround and ignoring response.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can locate first dispatch for each process.
I can compare FIFO behavior with RR baseline.
